reason: Browser use feature successfully executes browser navigation and page title retrieval, with live preview and tool call tracking.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Successfully loaded SuperAgent home page with agent list in sidebar.
Clicked on "QA-20260508-020355-5dce" agent in sidebar - Agent opened successfully with chat interface ready.
Typed and sent message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." - Message sent and agent began processing.
Waited up to 3 minutes for response - Response received in 8 seconds with agent status changing from "working" to "idle".
Verified response mentions "Example Domain" - Response displays "The page title is Example Domain." matching expected result.
Took screenshot - Screenshot captured showing complete conversation with browser preview panel displaying Example Domain page.
